scenarios.prompt: You won a new tablet! Click the link to get your prize now!
scenarios.feedback_correct: Great job! This message is not safe. Tell an adult if you win a prize you didn’t enter.
scenarios.feedback_wrong: Nice try! Don’t click links like this. Tell an adult for help.

scenarios.prompt: Someone you don’t know says: ‘Hi! Want to be my friend?’
scenarios.feedback_correct: Well done! Tell an adult if someone you don’t know messages you.
scenarios.feedback_wrong: Nice try! It’s safer to tell an adult if you don’t know the person.

scenarios.prompt: Get FREE game coins! Click here to get lots of rewards!
scenarios.feedback_correct: Good choice! Free rewards messages can be tricks. Tell an adult first.
scenarios.feedback_wrong: Nice try! Free rewards can be a trick. Tell an adult first.

scenarios.prompt: What is your name and how old are you? Type it here to play the game.
scenarios.feedback_correct: Great job! Don’t share personal info online. Tell an adult if you’re asked.
scenarios.feedback_wrong: Nice try! Don’t share personal info. Tell an adult if you’re asked.

scenarios.prompt: Hi, I am your teacher. Click this link to see your homework.
scenarios.feedback_correct: Well done! Some messages pretend to be someone you know. Check with an adult first.
scenarios.feedback_wrong: Nice try! It could be fake. Check with an adult first.

scenarios.prompt: Warning! Your tablet has a virus! Click here now to fix it!
scenarios.feedback_correct: Great choice! Scary warnings can be tricks. Tell an adult to help.
scenarios.feedback_wrong: Nice try! Don’t click scary warnings. Tell an adult to help.

scenarios.prompt: Click here to get free stickers sent to your house!
scenarios.feedback_correct: Good job! Never share your address. Tell an adult to stay safe.
scenarios.feedback_wrong: Nice try! Never share your address. Tell an adult to stay safe.

scenarios.prompt: I’m a new kid. Can you tell me where you live?
scenarios.feedback_correct: Excellent! Never tell strangers where you live. Tell a trusted adult.
scenarios.feedback_wrong: Nice try! Never tell strangers where you live. Tell a trusted adult.
